This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] <select> containing <option><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select> containing <hr><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select> containing <select><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><optgroup> containing <option><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><optgroup> containing <hr><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><optgroup> containing <select><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><optgroup> containing <optgroup><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><div><optgroup><div> containing <option><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><div><optgroup><div> containing <hr><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><div><optgroup><div> containing <select><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] <select><div><optgroup><div> containing <optgroup><option selected>
  assert_equals: expected 1 but got 2
Harness: the test ran to completion.
